title: Stable Cell Line Generation – RAW 264.7
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"98ef4","text":"This protocol details steps taken to create stably expressing cell lines in RAW 264.7 cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"7p19b","text":"DMEM (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 11965-092)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5jhv8","text":"FBS (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 16140-071)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"h9a8","text":"Penicillin/Streptomycin (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 15140122)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dktet","text":"CellStripper (Corning, 356230)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dqo0o","text":"Lipofectamine 2000 (Invitrogen, 11668019)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6k1a0","text":"FuGene HD (Promega, E2311)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"et20b","text":"Opti-Mem (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 31985062)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e04tv","text":"Puromycin (Gibco A11138-03)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"19gul","text":"Blasticidin (Invivogen ant-bl)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8bdg3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Plate 2.5 x 10^5 RAW 264.7 cells per well in a 6-well dish.
Transfect cells using Lipofectamine 2000 or FuGene HD. Ensure to use a 1:2 ratio of Piggybac transposon plasmid:gene-of-interest plasmid for a total of 1 uG DNA.

For Lipofectamine 2000 (HALO-LRRK2): In Tube 1 combine 150 µL Opti-MEM and 8 µL Lipofectamine 2000 then incubate for 00:05:00 . In Tube 2 combine 150 µL Opti-MEM and 1 uG total DNA (see above) then incubate for 00:05:00 . Combine tube 1 and tube 2. Incubate for 00:20:00 . Add drop-wise to 1 well containing 1.7 mL of media.
Use Puromycin (3.5 uG/mL) or Blasticidin (10 uG/mL).
After cells have recovered from antibiotic selection, plate single cells into 96-well dishes to obtain clonal cell lines. After subculturing, confirm cell lines via immunoblotting.
creator: Amanda Bentley-DeSousa
